parsed.availability_comment: Positive self-update exists, yet recent injury recurrence keeps pre-season availability uncertain.
parsed.availability_note: Player said on November 20, 2025 he expected to be available from day one, but his 2025 season ended with another back injury after only two matches.
parsed.followup_reason: Need March 2026 medical/selection confirmation; available-from-day-one claim is not yet backed by official pre-season playing confirmation after recurring back injuries.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: No overseas-cap issue; selection depends on fitness and workload within a crowded Indian pace group.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; overseas-slot rules do not affect his selection. Competition is with Shami, Avesh, Mohsin, Prince and other Indian seamers.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained and valued highly, but Indian pace depth plus repeat back setbacks make him a managed-use pick rather than locked XI.
